query:
-- Check TIAB/mobile services and their customer linkage status
-- First find all remaining tables
SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
  AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%tiab%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%mobile%' OR TABLE_NAME LIKE '%sim%'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
